acceptanceCriteria.AC1: PASS - Monorepo contains backend and frontend packages and shared tsconfig.base.json at workspace root.
acceptanceCriteria.AC2: PASS - Health endpoint verified with 200 OK at /api/health; backend defaults to port 3000 in src/index.ts when PORT is unset.
acceptanceCriteria.AC3: PASS - POST /api/forms/upload accepts multipart/form-data file field; valid PDF fixture upload returns HTTP 201.
acceptanceCriteria.AC4: PASS - Uploaded forms persisted in-memory with UUID formId and ISO createdAt; verified in GET /api/forms response.
acceptanceCriteria.AC5: PASS - Extraction runs automatically after upload; forms transition to extraction-complete or extraction-failed without manual trigger.
acceptanceCriteria.AC6: PASS - Draft schema shape confirmed on successful extraction includes formId, title, version, status=draft, and fields with id,label,type,required,order.
acceptanceCriteria.AC7: PASS - Supported field types verified via runtime schema and tests: text, textarea, date, number, radio, checkbox, select.
acceptanceCriteria.AC8: PASS - Successful upload response matches contract: { formId, status: extraction-complete, draftSchemaId }.
acceptanceCriteria.AC9: PASS - Non-PDF upload returns HTTP 400 with structured JSON error code INVALID_FILE_TYPE.
acceptanceCriteria.AC10: PASS - GET /api/forms now returns form items containing formId, title, status, createdAt.
acceptanceCriteria.AC11: PASS - GET /api/forms/:formId includes current schema in response as schema object when extraction succeeded.
acceptanceCriteria.AC12: PASS - Error responses consistently use shape { error: { code, message } } with structured payloads observed for INVALID_FILE_TYPE, EXTRACTION_FAILED, and SCHEMA_NOT_FOUND.
acceptanceCriteria.AC13: PASS - Unit tests cover file validation, extraction logic, and schema shape; npm test -- --runInBand: 5 suites, 69 tests passed.
acceptanceCriteria.AC14: PASS - Sample PDFs present in backend/test-fixtures including business-registration.pdf, housing-benefit-application.pdf, and universal-credit-change.pdf.
acceptanceCriteria.AC15: PASS - backend README documents setup, run commands, tests, and example curl API usage.

bugs.title: Extraction reliability varies across provided sample fixtures
bugs.steps: Upload housing-benefit-application.pdf and business-registration.pdf to POST /api/forms/upload
bugs.expected: Higher extraction success rate across bundled fixtures
bugs.actual: Both fixtures currently return structured 422 EXTRACTION_FAILED while universal-credit-change.pdf succeeds

recommendations: Add regression tests using real fixture binaries for all bundled PDFs to improve extraction reliability confidence.
Harden extraction fallbacks for malformed PDFs while preserving structured error behavior and process stability.
Keep monitoring /api/forms/:formId schema embedding behavior with integration tests to prevent AC11 regressions.
